chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer. Appln. No. S – 41 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 26.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Memon, Advocate along with Applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
